message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Specialist Doctor" as SD
participant ":CreateReportUI" as UI
participant ":CreateReportController" as CC
participant ":Company" as C
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TD
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TRS
participant "rp : TestReport" as TR
participant "obj : diagnosis" as D

SD -> UI: 1 asks to create a new diagnosis
activate UI
ref over UI, CC: US4_SD_testsDTO.puml
UI -> SD: 2 requests to choose a given test
SD -> UI: 3 chooses a given test
UI -> CC: 4 createTestDiagnosis(idTest)
activate CC
CC -> TD: 5 createTestDiagnosis(test)
activate TD
TD -> D: 6 createTestDiagnosis(testParameterList)
activate D
TD <- D
deactivate D
CC <- TD: 7 getDiagnosis()
deactivate TD
UI <- CC: 8 getDiagnosis()
deactivate CC
UI -> SD: 9 shows the diagnosis done automatically and requests the data for the report
SD -> UI: 10 types the requested data
activate UI
UI -> CC: 11 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
activate CC
CC -> C: 12 store = getTestReportStore()
activate C
CC <- C
deactivate C
CC -> TRS: 13 createReport(idTest, diagnosis, report)
activate TRS
TRS -> TR: 14 create(idTest, diagnosis, report)
activate TR
TRS <- TR
deactivate TR
CC -> TRS: 15 validateReport()
TRS <- CC
deactivate TRS
UI <- CC
deactivate CC
UI -> SD: 16 shows the typed data and asks for confirmation
SD -> UI: 17 confirms the data
UI -> CC: 18 saveReport(report)
activate CC
CC -> C: 19 saveReport(report)
activate C
C -> TRS: 20 saveReport(report)
activate TRS
TRS -> TRS: 21 validateReport(report)
activate TRS
TRS <- TRS
deactivate TRS
TRS -> TRS: 22 addReport(report)
activate TRS
TRS <- TRS
deactivate TRS
C <- TRS
deactivate TRS
CC <- C
deactivate C
UI <- CC
deactivate CC
UI -> SD: 23 informs operation success
deactivate UI
@enduml
```
